news-coverage.description: Newspaper articles covering Dr. Sanjay Gandhi's cardiac surgeries

items.title: Two-Month Infant's Complex Heart Surgery Saves Life
items.titleHindi: दो माह के मासूम का जटिल ऑपरेशन कर बचाई जान
items.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi performed a 5-hour complex surgery on a 2-month-old infant with congenital heart disease at Geetanjali Hospital. The baby had reversed heart vessels causing oxygen deprivation. Surgery involved cooling body to 18°C and correcting both main arteries. 150+ pediatric heart surgeries completed at GMCH.

items.title: First Successful Redo Ascending Aortic Aneurysm Operation in Rajasthan
items.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi performed Rajasthan's first redo ascending aortic aneurysm surgery on Om Prakash Jain (58) from Boondi. Patient had previous valve surgery 6 years ago at Fortis Jaipur. Aorta was 10cm (normal 2.5cm), 4x enlarged. 9-hour surgery. Delhi/Jaipur/Ahmedabad hospitals refused due to high risk.

items.title: Complex Heart Surgery on 7-Day-Old Infant
items.titleHindi: सात दिन के शिशु का जटिल हृदय ऑपरेशन
items.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi successfully operated on a 7-day-old newborn with congenital heart disease at Geetanjali Hospital. The baby had abdominal hernia complications. 5-hour surgery required cutting ribs to access heart. Post-surgery, baby placed on ventilator and recovered.

items.title: Successful Tracheal Stenosis Surgery
items.titleHindi: श्वांस की नली का सफल ऑपरेशन
items.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi performed tracheal surgery on Vimala Jat (24) from Chittorgarh suffering from tracheal stenosis. 5-hour operation where 4cm shrunk portion of windpipe was removed and reconnected. First such operation in Southern Rajasthan.

items.title: First Redo Aortic Aneurysm Treatment in Rajasthan
items.titleHindi: राजस्थान में प्रथम बार रीडू एऑटिक एन्यूरिज्म का सफल उपचार
items.description: Detailed Hindi coverage of the first redo ascending aortic aneurysm surgery. 9-hour operation at Geetanjali Hospital. Patient Om Prakash Jain's main heart artery was defective and could rupture anytime.

items.title: Successful Windpipe Surgery at Geetanjali
items.titleHindi: गीतांजली में सांस की नली का सफल ऑपरेशन
items.description: Coverage of tracheal stenosis surgery in Rashtradoot. First time in Southern Rajasthan this operation was performed successfully.

items.title: Milestone in Surgery - Valve Repair, Bypass & Clot Removal
items.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi and team at Geetanjali Medical College operated on Salim Mohammad for 8 hours - repairing dysfunctional valves, performing bypass surgery, and removing a clot from the heart. All problems treated in one single operation.

items.title: Complex Heart Surgery Successful on 82-Year-Old
items.titleHindi: 82 वर्षीय रोगी के दो जटिल हृदय ऑपरेशन सफल
items.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi performed successful bypass surgery and valve replacement on an 82-year-old patient Keshav Joshi from Sagwada. 6-hour operation.

items.title: Most Complex Heart Surgery
items.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi and team performed the most complex heart surgery - simultaneously fixing both valves, performing bypass, and removing clots from the heart. Team included Dr. Ankur Gandhi, Dr. Kalpesh Mistri, Dr. Manmohan Jindal.

items.title: 11-Hour High-Risk Surgery Saves 60-Year-Old
items.titleHindi: 11 घंटे के हाई रिस्क ऑपरेशन से 60 वर्षीय बुजुर्ग ने जीती जिंदगी
items.description: Cardiac surgeon Dr. Sanjay Gandhi performed 11-hour high-risk surgery on 60-year-old Darmi Bai from Swaroopganj, Abu Road. Patient had aortic dissection from valve to arch. CT angiogram revealed the dissection. Team: Dr. Ankur Gandhi, Kalpesh Mistri, Manmohan Jindal, Kamlesh Bhatt, Pradeep Hegde.

items.title: Heart Surgery on 2-Day-Old Baby
items.titleHindi: दो दिन की बच्ची के हृदय का ऑपरेशन
items.description: Baby Priyanka, just 2 days old, had reversed heart vessels preventing oxygen flow. Body was turning blue. Balloon atrial septostomy performed successfully. 7-hour surgery. Such cases occur in only 3-4 per 1000 births. Dr. Gandhi showed video of the operation to media.

items.title: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi Trained in Germany
items.titleHindi: डॉ. संजय गांधी जर्मनी से प्रशिक्षित हुए
items.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi trained at Leibniz Hannover University, Germany from Feb 28 to March 13 under Dr. Fredric Mohr on minimally invasive surgery techniques. Selected through Indo-German collaboration program based on resume screening from across India.

items.title: Rare Heart Tumor (Myxoma) Removed
items.titleHindi: गीतांजली हृदय शल्य विभाग ने दुर्लभ दिल का ट्यूमर (रसोली) निकाली
items.description: Devki Yadav's rare heart tumor (Myxoma) was blocking blood flow causing breathlessness, weakness, and fainting. The tumor was like a branch growing from the heart wall. 4-hour surgery under artificial heart-lung machine. Patient fully recovered in 7 days.

items.title: Successful Treatment of Heart & Brain Artery Blockage
items.titleHindi: हृदय एवं मस्तिष्क की मुख्य धमनियों में रुकावट का सफल उपचार
items.description: Successful surgery on carotid artery (brain's main artery) blockage along with heart artery treatment. Combined cardiac and vascular procedure.

items.title: Heart Wall Rupture, Valve Damage & Balloon Surgery at GMCH
items.titleHindi: हृदय की वॉल फटने, वॉल्व खराब होने और नस में गुब्बारे का जीएमसीएच में हुआ ऑपरेशन
items.description: GMCH cardiac team performed three complex procedures on a 50-year-old patient: repaired heart wall rupture after heart attack, fixed aneurysm (6x2.5cm), and replaced damaged valve. First of its kind claimed in Rajasthan. Team: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi, Dr. Ajay Varma, Dr. Ankur Gandhi, Dr. Kalpesh Mistri.

items.title: TAVI - Valve Replacement Using French & German Technique
items.titleHindi: फ्रेंच और जर्मन तकनीक से किया वाल्व प्रत्यारोपण
items.description: Geetanjali Cardiac Center performed open heart surgery-free valve replacement using latest French & German TAVI technique. A 72-year-old patient whose heart valves were shrunk was treated without opening the chest. Cardiologist Dr. Ramesh Patel, Urologist Dr. Bishwas Baheti, Dr. Ankur Vagh Sharma were in the team. Three TAVIs done at Geetanjali.

items.title: Advanced Cath Lab Inaugurated - World-Class Heart Treatment Now in Udaipur
items.titleHindi: गीतांजली हॉस्पिटल में अत्याधुनिक एडवांस्ड कैथ लैब शुरू, अब उदयपुर में मिलेगी विश्वस्तरीय हृदय चिकित्सा
items.description: Geetanjali Medical College expanded cardiac care with new Artis Pure Floor system (5 to 12 (3.0) Ceiling Mount). Features: telehealth-enabled control technology, unified workflows, high-precision imaging. Dr. Ramesh Patel leads the department - currently largest & most experienced cardiac team in Southern Rajasthan. Dr. Sanjay Gandhi among senior staff present.

surgery-photos.description: Live cardiac surgery and cath lab procedure photographs

items.title: Cardiac Surgery & Angiography - Patient Chandi Bai Jat
items.doctors: Dr. SG (Sanjay Gandhi), Dr. BKS, Dr. R. Patel
items.description: Complete documentation of a cardiac catheterization and open-heart surgery. Images show: DSA angiography of aorta and coronary arteries, fluoroscopy-guided procedures, open-heart surgery with Siemens Artis Zee ceiling-mounted system, surgical team performing valve/coronary work under surgical lights.

items.title: 50th Patient Recovered by ECMO Team
items.description: Official GMCH poster celebrating 50th patient recovery using ECMO machine. Featured case: IT student recovered from Celphos (aluminium phosphide) poisoning. ECMO temporarily takes over heart and lung function, providing oxygen and removing CO2 when body cannot.

items.title: ECMO Machine Becomes Life-Saver at Geetanjali
items.titleHindi: गीतांजली हॉस्पिटल में एक्मो मशीन बनी जीवनदायनी
items.description: Detailed coverage of how ECMO saved a 21-year-old from Dungarpur who consumed Celphos poison. The patient's heart stopped; ECMO machine kept blood circulating. After recovery, patient shifted to ICU. Dr. Sanjay Gandhi, Dr. Anubhav Bansal, Dr. Gurpreet Singh and full multi-specialty team credited.

awards.description: Awards and recognitions received by Dr. Sanjay Gandhi

items.title: IACTS Technocollege CME - Chairperson Felicitation
items.organization: Indian Association of Cardiovascular Thoracic Surgeons
items.venue: Pt. B.D. Sharma University of Health Sciences, Rohtak
items.description: Felicitation plaque awarded to Dr. Sanjay Gandhi as Chairperson for his immense contribution towards the Continuing Medical Education programme. Signed by Dr. S.S. Lohchab, Organising Secretary.

items.title: IACTS Award Ceremony Photo - Excellence in Cardiac Surgery
items.organization: Indian Association of Cardiovascular Thoracic Surgeons
items.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi receiving the award at IACTS Technocollege event themed 'New Heights of Excellence in Cardiac Surgery Through Emerging Technology'. Photo shows him receiving plaque from senior dignitary.

items.title: Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot Tweeted Praise for Surgery Team
items.description: Screenshot of Rajasthan CM Ashok Gehlot's tweet praising the Udaipur doctors team. The tweet references a Dainik Bhaskar article about a rare heart surgery done free under Chiranjeevi Yojana (7 lakh surgery). CM congratulated the team and wished patient Dinesh speedy recovery. Tweet got 39 replies, 22 retweets, 852 likes.

Miraculous Survival: Newborn weighing just ONE POUND survives heart surgery

profile.title: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi - Profile Photo
profile.description: Professional portrait in surgical attire, used across hero, about, and expertise pages

heart-graphics.title: Anatomical Heart Illustration
heart-graphics.description: Red anatomical heart graphic used as decorative background across all pages

heart-graphics.title: Dr. Gandhi Full-body CTA overlay
heart-graphics.description: Used as faded background in CTA sections

landmark-case-470g-baby.title: World's Tiniest Baby 470 Grams Survives Heart Surgery
landmark-case-470g-baby.description: 15-day-old, 470g baby underwent cardiac surgery at Geetanjali Hospital. World's first claim. Dainik Bhaskar coverage with Dr. Sanjay Gandhi named. Baby weighed just 489g at time of echocardiography. Surgery performed on May 5. Coverage across 8 cities.

landmark-case-470g-baby.title: 470g Newborn in ICU
landmark-case-470g-baby.description: Photo of the world's tiniest baby (470g) in NICU with IV lines, showing the baby's extremely small size compared to an adult finger.

landmark-case-470g-baby.title: 470g Baby Surgery - Surgical Team in Operation
landmark-case-470g-baby.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi's surgical team performing open heart surgery on the 470g baby. Green drapes, surgical loupes visible.

news-2016.title: Times of India - Aortic Aneurysm Coverage
Pratahkal - Heart & Brain Artery Blockage Treatment
news-2016.description: Successful treatment of blockage in heart and brain main arteries. Man Singh (61) from Banswada with bypass + carotid endarterectomy. 6-hour operation. First in Southern Rajasthan.

news-2017.title: 2-Year-Old Child Heart Hole - Hybrid Surgery with Percutaneous Device
news-2017.description: Geetanjali Hospital first in the state to perform hybrid surgery on 2-year-old Gayatri from Chittorgarh. Percutaneous device implanted to close heart hole without open surgery. Team: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi, Dr. Surendra Patel, Dr. CP Purohit, Dr. Harish Samadhya, Dr. Ramesh Patel, Dr. Ankur Gandhi, Dr. Kalpesh Mistri.

news-2021-covid-era.title: Complex Surgery Saves 42-Year-Old - Aorta Rupture
news-2021-covid-era.titleHindi: जटिल सर्जरी कर रोगी को दिया जीवनदान
news-2021-covid-era.description: 42-year-old Akhilesh Kumar from Salumber with ruptured main aorta. 10-hour Bentall operation. Team: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi, Dr. Ajay Verma, Dr. Parth Waghela, Dr. Ankur Gandhi, Dr. Kalpesh Mistri, Dr. Ramchandran, Dr. Harshil Joshi. 11-12 Bentall operations done in Udaipur.

news-2021-covid-era.title: Main Artery Rupture - Complex Surgery Successful
news-2021-covid-era.titleHindi: रोगी के हृदय की मुख्य नाड़ी फटने पर जटिल सर्जरी द्वारा सफल ऑपरेशन
news-2021-covid-era.description: Same case covered in Rashtradoot - detailed description of the 10-hour surgery on Akhilesh Kumar. Aorta burst internally, CT scan revealed aneurysm. Valve also damaged. Cooled to 16°C during surgery.

news-2021-covid-era.title: COVID-Recovered Patient's Aorta Surgery at Geetanjali
news-2021-covid-era.titleHindi: कोरोना महामारी से हाल ही में ठीक हुए रोगी की हृदय की मुख्य नाड़ी एओर्टा फटने पर जटिल सर्जरी द्वारा गीतांजली हॉस्पिटल में हुआ सफल इलाज
news-2021-covid-era.description: Same Bentall operation case with additional COVID context - patient had recently recovered from COVID. Challenges: 1) rare disease 2) post-COVID 3) patient's father also had COVID. Family was going through extreme difficulty.

success-stories.title: 8-Year-Old Child Valve Replacement Success
success-stories.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi performed valve replacement on 8-year-old Chhogaram from Sirohi. Child had breathing difficulty and fever for 8 months. 6-hour surgery at Geetanjali. Child recovered within a day.

success-stories.title: 1.5-Year-Old Complex Heart Operation
success-stories.titleHindi: डेढ़ साल की मासूम के दो जटिल ऑपरेशन सफल
success-stories.description: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi operated on 1.5-year-old Gunjan from Mewasa. Heart vessels and arteries were in wrong position. Blood circulation was affected causing red eyes, swelling. Referred from Bangalore. Complex double operation successful.

special-cases.title: Achievement - 75-Year-Old Ruptured Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm (Emergency)
special-cases.description: Collage: 75-year-old gentleman presented in shock with ruptured abdominal aortic aneurysm. Emergency surgery without preparation - only cross match done. Foley's balloon used to control blood gush. BP was 50-80mmHg on inotropes. Team: Dr. Surender Patel, Dr. Ankur, Dr. Kalpesh, Dr. Manmohan, Dr. Tasha Purohit. Pratahkal coverage dated Fri Mar 16, 2018.

special-cases.title: Pre & Post Operative CT Angiography Comparison
special-cases.description: 3D CT angiography showing before (ruptured/enlarged aorta) and after (repaired) comparison of an aortic aneurysm case. Dramatic visual of surgical success.

banner.title: Dr. Sanjay Gandhi Banner Image
banner.description: Full banner image of Dr. Gandhi
